The '''Okfili''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]],<ref name="TRG1" /> they were allied with the Alliance.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|406|Okfili}}</ref> At some point by that time, an [[Okfili art object|art object]] of great religious significance to the Okfili was stolen from them, coming into the possession of a [[Unidentified pirate group (Sayblohn)|group]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] based on<ref name="TRG1" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Sayblohn system/Legends|Sayblohn system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sayblohn]].<ref name="TRG1" /> The Okfili requested that the Alliance find the art object, to which end a Rebel [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|special operative team]] was sent to Sayblohn to retrieve the artifact.<ref name="CSWE" />

{{RPGseed}}
The Rebel team ultimately succeeded in its task.<ref name="TRG1" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Okfili were introduced in the [[1987]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|rulebook]] for the first edition of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TRG1" /> They shared their name with the [[Okfili system]] of<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]]<ref name="OuterRim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> that was introduced in [[Glen Allison]]'s article "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," which was published in the [[1990]] [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine.<ref name="Twinkle" /> The article is considered [[Canon|noncanonical]] with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
